name: Medium of the Ice Barrier

desc: If your opponent controls 4 or more cards than you do, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Your opponent can only activate 1 Spell/Trap Card each turn.
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls 4 or more cards than you do, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Your opponent can only activate 1 Spell/Trap Card each turn.
eff: If your opponent controls 4 or more cards than you do, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Your opponent can only activate 1 Spell/Trap Card each turn.

jp_sets.set: Duel Terminal Chronicle 1 - Chapter of Awakening
Structure Deck: Ice Barrier of the Frozen Prison

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
